title: Secure Intermediate Data Management
description: The 'security' directory in Hadoop MapReduce houses Java classes IntermediateEncryptedStream.java and SpillCallBackPathsFinder.java. IntermediateEncryptedStream.java encrypts input/output streams and manages spill callbacks for secure intermediate file handling. SpillCallBackPathsFinder.java tracks spilled files, distinguishing encrypted and non-encrypted ones, and handles invalid access attempts. Both classes collaborate, adhering to the Mediator pattern, to ensure secure and efficient spill file management in Hadoop MapReduce.
